{{Infobox group
| name = The Hounds
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Hounds]] track targets through time to find criminals and predict disasters.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The symbol of the [[Hounds]] is a three-headed dog.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Abidan]] have [[Hounds]], Spiders, and [[Ghosts]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Abidan]] [[Hounds]] see [[Jek’nan]]'s actions as unlikely probabilities.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
